subcodes.first_line: All praise be to Thee, O Lord my God! This is one of the days of Thy Riḍván Festival whereon a servant of Thine hath extended an invitation
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی هذا یوم من ایام رضوانک و فیه استدعی احد من عبادک مظهر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @suffering and imprisonment
